untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (double tops formation, identification of two distinct peaks at same price level, lowest low between tops) requires pattern recognition logic not expressible with basic technical indicators. The measure rule exit (pattern height calculation) requires historical pattern geometry data unavailable in allowed indicators. Volume confirmation for industry-wide topping patterns also not expressible.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using support/resistance levels as proxy for confirmation point. Entry uses s1 (support 1) as approximate confirmation level below pattern. Exit uses r1 (resistance 1) as approximate reversal target. However, this does not capture the core pattern logic. The 72-79% hit rate and 19% average decline are documented but cannot be operationalized without pattern detection. Recommend implementing custom pattern recognition module for proper double-top detection.
